---
title: ""
author: ""
#date: "`r format(Sys.Date(), '%B %d, %Y')`"
output:
  bookdown::word_document2:
    reference_docx: ref_doc/apa_style.docx # refdoc copied from JV Casillas in LexTALE diagnostics repo
    toc: false
    number_sections: false
fontsize: 12pt
linestretch: 2
bibliography: bib/references.bib
csl: bib/apa.csl

---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE
  )
```

```{r, child='./sections/01_abstract.Rmd'}
```

\newpage

```{r, child='./sections/02_intro.Rmd'}
```

```{r, child='./sections/03_method.Rmd'}
```

```{r, child='./sections/04_results.Rmd'}
```

```{r, child='./sections/05_discussion.Rmd'}
```

\newpage
```{r, child='./sections/06_supplementary.Rmd'}
```

\newpage
# References
